description: Rats Search - BitTorrent P2P Search Engine metrics

panels.title: Overview
panels.description: High-level status indicators for all major subsystems at a glance.

panels.title: API Status
panels.description: Current state of the HTTP API server. Shows UP when the REST API on port 8095 is accepting connections, DOWN otherwise.

panels.title: P2P Network
panels.description: Current state of the peer-to-peer network. Shows UP when the P2P subsystem (librats) is running and connected to the BitTorrent DHT, DOWN otherwise.

panels.title: Database
panels.description: Current state of the Manticore Search database. Shows UP when the full-text search engine is ready to accept queries, DOWN otherwise.

panels.title: DHT Spider
panels.description: Current state of the DHT spider (crawler). Shows RUNNING when the spider is actively walking the DHT network and indexing torrents, STOPPED otherwise.

panels.title: Uptime
panels.description: Total time since the API server process started, in seconds. Resets on container restart.

panels.title: Connected Peers
panels.description: Current number of active P2P peers connected via the BitTorrent DHT network.

panels.title: P2P Network
panels.description: Detailed metrics for the BitTorrent P2P network, DHT routing, and spider activity.

panels.title: Connected Peers
panels.description: Historical view of P2P peer count over time. Helps identify network connectivity issues and peer churn patterns.

panels.title: DHT Nodes
panels.description: Number of nodes in the DHT routing table. P2P Network shows the main client's routing table, Spider DHT Nodes shows the crawler's. Both should stay above 10 for effective network traversal.

panels.title: Spider Stats
panels.description: DHT spider activity: Indexed (total torrents discovered and stored), Pending Fetches (metadata downloads in progress), Visited Nodes (unique DHT nodes contacted).

panels.title: Database
panels.description: Manticore Search database statistics: torrent count, file count, content size, and growth trends.

panels.title: Total Torrents
panels.description: Total number of unique torrents indexed in the Manticore Search database.

panels.title: Total Files
panels.description: Total number of individual files across all indexed torrents.

panels.title: Total Content Size
panels.description: Combined size in bytes of all content across all indexed torrents. Useful for understanding the scale of the index.

panels.title: Torrents & Files Growth
panels.description: Historical growth of indexed torrents and files over time. A flat line means the spider is not discovering new content.

panels.title: Content Size Growth
panels.description: Historical growth of total indexed content size. Useful for capacity planning and monitoring indexing rate.

panels.title: Downloads
panels.description: Active torrent download client metrics: speed, progress, and completion status.

panels.title: Active Downloads
panels.description: Number of torrents currently being downloaded by the built-in torrent client.

panels.title: Paused Downloads
panels.description: Number of torrents that are downloading but currently paused.

panels.title: Total Downloaded
panels.description: Cumulative bytes downloaded across all active and completed torrents.

panels.title: Download Speed
panels.description: Current aggregate download speed in bytes/second across all active downloads.

panels.title: Download Speed Over Time
panels.description: Historical download speed. Shows bandwidth usage patterns and peak download periods.

panels.title: Downloads Count
panels.description: Historical view of download counts: Active (in progress), Paused, and Total (including completed).

panels.title: HTTP & WebSocket API
panels.description: REST API and WebSocket server metrics: request rates, connections, and message throughput.

panels.title: HTTP Requests Rate
panels.description: Rate of incoming HTTP API requests per second. Shows Total, Success (2xx), and Error (4xx/5xx) request rates.

panels.title: WebSocket Connections & Messages
panels.description: WebSocket server activity: Connections (currently connected clients) and Messages/sec (incoming message rate). WebSocket clients receive real-time event broadcasts.

panels.title: Cumulative Totals
panels.description: Lifetime counters for all HTTP requests, successful requests, errors, and WebSocket messages since server start.

panels.title: Request Performance
panels.description: API response time analysis: latency percentiles, request classification by method and status code.

panels.title: HTTP Request Duration (p50/p95/p99)
panels.description: HTTP API response time percentiles in seconds. p50 = median, p95 = 95th percentile, p99 = 99th percentile. High values indicate slow API responses.

panels.title: HTTP Requests by Method
panels.description: Rate of HTTP requests broken down by HTTP method (GET, POST). Useful for understanding API usage patterns.

panels.title: HTTP Requests by Status Code
panels.description: Rate of HTTP responses broken down by status code (200, 400, 404). Spikes in 4xx indicate client errors; spikes in 5xx indicate server issues.

panels.title: Search Query Duration (p50/p95/p99)
panels.description: Full-text search query response time percentiles. Tracks only search.torrents and search.files API calls. High values may indicate index performance issues.

panels.title: Spider & Index
panels.description: DHT spider indexing performance, database size, and metadata fetch success rates.

panels.title: Database Index Size
panels.description: Total on-disk size of the Manticore Search index files, updated every 60 seconds.

panels.title: Search Queries Total
panels.description: Cumulative number of search queries (search.torrents, search.files) executed since server start.

panels.title: Fetch Success
panels.description: Total number of successfully completed metadata fetches by the DHT spider.

panels.title: Fetch Errors
panels.description: Total number of failed metadata fetches by the DHT spider. High error rate may indicate network issues or aggressive rate limiting by peers.

panels.title: Database Index Size Over Time
panels.description: Historical growth of the Manticore Search index on disk. Useful for monitoring disk usage and indexing rate.

panels.title: Spider Fetch Success vs Errors
panels.description: Rate of successful vs failed metadata fetches over time. A high error ratio may indicate the spider needs tuning.

title: Rats Search
